# The Fool´s Descent
![Gemini Generated Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sant-mell/myTC2005B/main/Fool/Gemini_Generated_Image_om4mquom4mquom4m.png)


**© 2025 ________ . All rights reserved.**
  

## _Game Design Document_

Not so long ago, there was only **The Dealer** and the **Great Deck** was full.  The aparition of the universe, life, love,  death, and every hearbeat was shuffled and assigned to the world's spirits with an organized Great Deck and dealt by an organized, expert dealer who knew what was best for the order of the universe. 

Due to an unknown change of events, the dealer has become bored and cynical, and has chosen to change things up. He shuffled the Great Deck and threw its cards like autumn leaves across the mortal plane.

You are **The Fool**, the only born soul born without an assigned future in a dying and chaotic world where the fate has become anarchic. To save what remains, you must dive into the unknown, face **The Dealer** at his own table and gamble the right to exist.





**Authors**

 - Santiago Aguilar Mello
 -  Miguel Eduardo Vega Bisonó 
 - Regina Fernanda Portela Palacios

**Teachers**

-   Esteban Castillo Juarez
-   Gilberto Echerría Furió
-   Jose Angel Martinez Navarro

# Game Design


  

## Gameplay

 
The Fool’s Descent is an indie tabletop roguelike trading card game where the player explores a procedurally generated map and battles opponents using a deck of cards with strategic decision-making and risk management, where probability, assessment and memory all take into place in order to make the player’s best fitting decision.
 
 The gameplay unfolds on a wooden table, where your opponent is facing in front of you. The fate cards will be shown, put on the main deck, shuffled in an unknown number and put face down on the table. Each participant's choice is the next card's target. Wether you lose a life, get an extra turn or your opponent gets the next turn is based off your own guess.
  

Descripción básica del juego

Elementos de Roguelite y de Trading Card Game que contiene el juego

Reglas y mecánicas básicas del juego

Estilo visual del juego

Listado de estadísticas va a recopilar el juego dentro de la base de datos

  

### Cards

Main Deck (amount of cards in deck is random)

Only two types of cards… “these Tarot cards hold incredible power of prophecies…Two cards. Luck will decide.”  
“The Sun changes nothing.”  
“The Moon changes everything.”

“These are not fortunes.”  
“They are outcomes.”

#### The Sun
Nothing happens, the game continues.

Sun cards give a positive fortune, possible fortunes:

- “You can now blink voluntarily”
- “You can remember your past… as far as yesterday at least”
- “You can now read your own thought”
- “You can now see through almost anything… that’s made out of glass”
- “You have now gained the ability to touch grass (please do)”

#### The Moon
The character affected loses one life.

Moon cards give a funny negative fortune, possible fortunes:

- “Spontanious combustion”
- “You will be hit by a car… while sleeping tonight”
- “You will get a very specific and rare disease… at least you get to name it”
- “You are now allergic to oxygen”
- “You can now attract bullets”

---

### Characters Deck Options

#### Common Cards
- **The Magician:** Repeats the effect of the last card played by the character during this combat.
- **The Chariot:** Throws away the top card of the deck.
- **The Star:** When you reach 0 lifes it revives you with an extra single one.
- **Page of Pentacles:** If you win the next round it gives you a coin bonus.
- **Strength:** During the next round you are immune to death.
- **Two of Pentacles:** Draw two cards from the main deck, choose one to resolve, the other is annulled.

#### Rare Cards
- **The High Priestess:** Can see the next card from the main deck.
- **The Hermit:** Skips your next draw phase entirely.
- **Justice:** If you lose a life during your next turn, your opponent loses one too.
- **Wheel of Fortune:** Shuffles the main deck.

#### Epic Cards
- **The Lovers:** Opponent won’t attack unless attacked first.
- **The Tower:** Randomly destroys 50% of your enemy player's deck.
- **The Devil:** You gain two lifes BUT it adds one additional moon card to the main deck.
- **The Hanged Man:** Blocks the other player from using their player's deck cards during their next turn.

#### Legendary Cards
- **The Fool:** Randomly applies any of the existing cards, even if they are not in your current playing deck.
- **King of Pentacles:** If this card is played on your 7th turn, your money doubles.

---

# Mindset

What kind of mindset do you want to provoke in the player?  
Do you want them to feel powerful, or weak?  
Adventurous, or nervous?  
Hurried, or calm?  
How do you intend to provoke those emotions?

(The summary and gameplay parts also need to be on a slides presentation)

## Elevator pitch

Roguelite basado en la era medieval  

Descripción básica del juego  

Elementos de Roguelite y de Trading Card Game que contiene el juego  
Reglas y mecánicas básicas del juego  
Estilo visual del juego  
Listado de estadísticas va a recopilar el juego dentro de la base de datos  

---

## 15 cartas

- Sacar una carta mala del deck  
- Sacar una carta buena del deck  
- Ver la segunda carta  
- Quitar algo de vida al oponente  
- Ganar algo de vida  
- Ver la ultima carta  
- Cambiar la primera y ultima carta  
- Quemar la carta de arriba  
- Lovers- Besar oponente (no hace nada)  

### Raras
- Duplicar tu dinero si se juega la carta en el 7mo turno  
- Muerte instantanea  
- Carta #67 oponente mueve las manos arriba y abajo  

---

# Technical

## Screens

### Main Screen
Includes a play game, settings, and exit game buttons along with a themed background and text.  
Buttons: [New Descent], [Options], [Exit]

### Level selection
A graph structured map will pop up, with each node representing where the player, enemy, shop or upgrade shop is.  
It offers a choice between low risk but low regarding options and high risk alternatives.  
This will allow players to plan ahead and be strategic before fighting.

Nodes: Battle, Boss, mystery, Merchant and Rest Site

### Duel
A dimmed table with medieval and renaissance themes is displayed, with one out of the 10 opponents facing you.  
The table includes a stack of cards (main deck).  
Each participant has 10 card slots.

Elements:
- Shared Prophecy Deck
- Player hand (10 slots)
- Opponent avatar and life counter

### Upgrade
A menu displaying the player's current cards allows them to upgrade them by collecting 3 by pressing the Infuse button.  

Buttons: [Exit], [Infuse]

---

## Controls

**Mouse:** Drag cards from the hand to the “Prophecy slot” to play. Hover over cards to see details.  
**Keyboard:** ESC for pause, SPACE for confirming the outcome.

---

## Mechanics

### Duel Mechanics

The player will have a duel against a CPU.  
Each participant has 3 lifes.

---

### Prophecy Deck

Both participants draw from the same stack (Sun and Moon cards).

#### Load
At the start of each round:

- Deck Size: `S = base + random(0, 2)`  
- Moon cards: `deck - random(0, deck-1)`

The player does not know if the next card is Sun or Moon.

---

### Effects

- **Moon cards:** Drain life  
- **Sun cards:**  
  - If applied to self → extra turn  
  - If applied to opponent → lose turn, opponent unaffected  

---

### Choose

A participant is randomly selected and must decide:

- Use a card from their deck  
**or**
- Start the prophecy deck mechanic
